system.description: A Space Marine is a master of the tools of warfare, but through long practice and affinity he may reach a level of mastery with a particular type of weapon so that it becomes a tool of perfect destruction.
system.benefit: When this Talent is taken, a type and class of weapons must be specified, such as Bolt (Pistols) or Melee (Chain). This Talent may be taken multiple times for different types and classes of weapons. When using the specified weapon type and class, penalties to Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill Tests with that weapon can never be worse than –30.
system.notes: Choose weapon type and class. Caps penalties at -30. Can be taken multiple times for different weapon types.

specialAbilities.name: Astartes Weapon Specialisation
specialAbilities.description: When using chosen weapon type and class, penalties never exceed -30. Specify weapon type when taking this talent.
